name: Sigiriya Rock Fortress
description: An ancient rock citadel with frescoes, landscaped water gardens, mirror wall inscriptions, and panoramic views over Sri Lanka's dry zone plains.

name: Galle Fort
description: A UNESCO-listed coastal fort where colonial ramparts, museums, cafes, boutiques, and sunset walks meet the Indian Ocean.
address: Church Street, Galle Fort, Galle, Sri Lanka

name: Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic
description: Sri Lanka's most revered Buddhist temple, located beside Kandy Lake and known for daily rituals, heritage architecture, and cultural pageantry.
address: Sri Dalada Veediya, Kandy, Sri Lanka

name: Nine Arch Bridge
description: A photogenic stone railway bridge framed by tea estates and jungle, best visited around train crossing times in Ella.

name: Mirissa Beach
description: A relaxed southern beach town known for surfing, whale watching, coconut hill viewpoints, and golden evening light.

name: Yala National Park
description: A famous wildlife reserve with leopards, elephants, birdlife, coastal lagoons, and safari routes through dry-zone forest.

name: Cinnamon Grand Colombo
description: A centrally located five-star hotel close to shopping, restaurants, the oceanfront promenade, and Colombo's business district.

name: Ministry of Crab
description: A celebrated seafood restaurant in the Old Dutch Hospital precinct, popular for Sri Lankan lagoon crab and lively city dining.
address: Old Dutch Hospital, Colombo 01, Sri Lanka

name: Adam's Peak
description: A sacred mountain climb famous for pre-dawn pilgrimages, cool hill-country air, and sunrise views from the summit.
openingHours: Best climbed overnight during pilgrimage season

name: Dambulla Cave Temple
description: A hillside cave temple complex filled with Buddhist murals, statues, and sweeping views over the cultural triangle.

name: Sinharaja Forest Reserve
description: A biodiverse rainforest reserve with guided trails, endemic birds, waterfalls, and dense tropical canopy.

name: Arugam Bay
description: A legendary east-coast surf town with point breaks, beach cafes, lagoon trips, and a laid-back traveler scene.
address: Arugam Bay, Eastern Province, Sri Lanka

name: Nuwara Eliya Tea Country
description: A cool hill-country escape with tea factories, colonial-era gardens, misty lakes, and scenic drives through plantations.
address: Nuwara Eliya, Central Province, Sri Lanka

name: Hikkaduwa Coral Sanctuary
description: A lively beach stop for snorkeling, reef viewing, turtles, surf schools, and casual oceanfront dining.

name: Jetwing Lighthouse
description: A coastal hotel designed by Geoffrey Bawa, pairing ocean views, dramatic staircases, and easy access to Galle Fort.

name: Colombo National Museum
description: Sri Lanka's largest museum, with royal regalia, historical artifacts, sculpture, manuscripts, and leafy grounds near Viharamahadevi Park.
address: Sir Marcus Fernando Mawatha, Colombo 07, Sri Lanka
